expectations.text: behavioral_check: First diagnostic step is `len(ClusterlessDecodingSelection & key)` (or equivalent inspection of the selection key) — because `ClusterlessDecodingV1`'s only direct parent is `ClusterlessDecodingSelection`, an empty key_source most directly means the selection row is missing or the restriction does not match
expectations.evidence: Names ClusterlessDecodingSelection as the row that must exist and lists 'selection row doesn't exist' as the first 'common silent-failure mode'.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Walks `ClusterlessDecodingSelection.parents()` and checks `(parent & key)` for each *only* if building the selection or if the selection insert itself is blocked by a missing FK target — names UnitWaveformFeaturesGroup AND PositionGroup AND DecodingParameters AND IntervalList as those parents
expectations.evidence: All four parents (UnitWaveformFeaturesGroup, PositionGroup, DecodingParameters, IntervalList) named with section-by-section quick-check snippets.
